instruction: Generate a JSON configuration for CARLA simulator with the following scenario:
input: Large delivery truck performs slow cut-in maneuver in urban traffic. When the ego vehicle's speed drops below 10 m/s, the truck changes lanes into the ego's lane with linear dynamics over 4 seconds, demonstrating a typical slow cut-in by large commercial vehicles in urban environments.

instruction: Generate a CARLA scenario JSON based on this description:

It then performs a series of aggressive lane changes: right at 3 seconds, back left at 5.5 seconds, and left again when more than 40 meters ahead of the ego. This demonstrates complex weaving behavior through traffic with multiple sequential lane changes.
